name: Irish Cream Liqueur
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cup or up to 1 3/4 cups Irish Whiskey (or rye Whiskey, bourbon, scotch)
14 oz Eagle Brand SWEETENED CONDENSED milk (not evaporated milk)
1 pint whipping cream or coffee cream
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender container, combine all ingredients.
2. Blend until smooth.
3. Store tightly covered in the refrigerator for up to one month.
4. Stir before serving. (Use only Grade A clean, uncracked eggs.)
